lede: A look at March 22 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Artūrs Šilovs and Michael Janyk, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Crocus City Hall attack
events.desc: At least 145 people are killed and 551 injured in a bombing and mass shooting at the Crocus City Hall in Krasnogorsk, Russia.

events.title: 2013 Thailand refugee camp fire
events.desc: At least 37 people are killed and 200 are injured after a fire destroys a camp containing Burmese refugees near Ban Mae, Thailand.

events.title: Comet Hale–Bopp
events.desc: Comet Hale–Bopp reaches its closest approach to Earth at 1.315 AU.

events.title: Astronaut
events.desc: Cosmonaut Valeri Polyakov returns to earth after setting a record of 438 days in space.

events.title: USAir Flight 405
events.desc: USAir Flight 405 crashes shortly after takeoff from New York City's LaGuardia Airport, leading to a number of studies into the effect that ice has on aircraft.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: In the Mediterranean Sea, the Royal Navy confronts Italy's Regia Marina in the Second Battle of Sirte.

events.title: Phan Xích Long
events.desc: Mystic Phan Xích Long, the self-proclaimed Emperor of Vietnam, is arrested for organising a revolt against the colonial rule of French Indochina, which was nevertheless carried out by his supporters the following day.

events.title: Charilaos Vasilakos
events.desc: Charilaos Vasilakos wins the first modern Olympic marathon race with a time of three hours and 18 minutes.

events.title: Slave Trade Act of 1794
events.desc: The Slave Trade Act of 1794 bans the export of slaves from the United States, and prohibits American citizens from outfitting a ship for the purpose of importing slaves.

events.title: Emerald Buddha
events.desc: The Emerald Buddha is moved with great ceremony to its current location in Wat Phra Kaew, Thailand.

births.name: Galina Korchuganova
births.line: Russian-born Soviet test pilot and aerobatics champion (died 2004)

births.name: He Long
births.line: Chinese general and politician, 1st Vice Premier of the People's Republic of China (died 1969)

deaths.text: Lionel Jospin, French civil servant and politician, 165th Prime Minister of France
Léon Balcer, Canadian lawyer and politician, 19th Solicitor General of Canada
Konstanty Kalinowski, writer, journalist, lawyer and revolutionary

observances.text: Christian feast day: Blessed Clemens August Graf von Galen
